name: 5-Wick Clear Glass Pampas Knob-Lid Jar Candle 28oz - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Soothe your senses with the 5-Wick Clear Glass Pampas Knob-Lid Jar Candle from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This clear glass jar candle is designed in a round bowl shape and has a gold-tone lid with a knob for extra visual appeal. Elegantly made with soy, paraffin and palm wax, this five-wick candle features violet, woodsy and amber scents, and it's designed with a burn time of around 40 hours for lasting use.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
